metadata.title:
FREE SPEECH is NOT


INVOLVED, He SAYS

pages.raw_text:
1.-THE matter Of free speech is
not involved in this fight between
the Industrial Workers of the
World and the police. The I. W.
w. can have all the free speech it
wants in hall or on a vacant lot
somewhere, and we will give them
police protection" This is an as
sertion made to The Press this
morning by Mayor N. s. Pratt.


1--WE do not object to giving the
people their rights, but it is really
absurd to think that we should be
compelled to give them the privi
lege of speaking wherever they
choose. These city streets were
built for business and traffic-not
for the congregation of vast
crowds at any time a street speak
err may choose to draw one about
him.


1--WE might give the matter more
serious consideration if it were
brought before us by more local
people-citizens of the city-but
